name: Sparse Kent
description: Minimal profile — only name, DOB, birthplace. Tests thin-zone questioning and safe resume with little context.

events.content: Hello Kent, I'm Lori. I'm here to help you tell your story. Where would you like to begin?
Well, I was born in Stanley.
Stanley, North Dakota — that's wonderful. What was life like growing up there?
It was... well, it was farming country. My dad had a wheat farm.

expected_behaviors.resume: Should ask about farming or Stanley without repeating birthplace question
expected_behaviors.confidence: low — very few turns, minimal context
expected_behaviors.thread_detection: Should detect 'Farm & rural life' or 'Parents & family'
